description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a large, circular handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a colorful geometric design, including a red triangle, blue rectangle, yellow circle, green line, and purple bar, along with some black text and shapes near the base. The top of the cup is open, revealing a brownish liquid inside, suggesting it is filled with a beverage such as coffee or tea. The handle is smoothly integrated into the cup's body, providing an ergonomic grip. The surface of the cup appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramics. The overall design is playful and modern, making it suitable for both home and urban café settings.
description: A white ceramic cup with a large handle, filled with a brown liquid and decorated with colorful geometric shapes and text on the front. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left, colorful geometric decorations, and visible text on the cup's surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle not visible and the geometric decorations partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Back view with the handle on the right and no visible decorations or text.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the handle prominently and a partial glimpse of the colorful decorations on the right edge.
